```json
{
  "diagnosis": "Inverted boolean logic in hasBlockedSource(). The function should return true if source/type is 'social' or 'fanart', but the introduced '!' causes it to return true only for non-blocked sources, making all candidate covers with trusted sources (e.g., rawg, steamgriddb) be classified as blockedSource and thus rejected. This prevents the site from displaying game covers.",
  "file": "backend/src/services/gameCoverService.js",
  "fix_type": "code_patch",
  "patch": {
    "search": "return !(source.includes('social') || source.includes('fanart') || type.includes('social') || type.includes('fanart'));",
    "replace": "return source.includes('social') || source.includes('fanart') || type.includes('social') || type.includes('fanart');"
  },
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "decisao": "NEEDS_FIX"
}
```

--- a/backend/src/services/gameCoverService.js

 function hasBlockedSource(candidate = {}) {
   const source = normalizeTitle(candidate.source || candidate.provider || '');
